problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
